title: Omicron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Omicron''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[Omicron-class attack shuttle|''Omicron''-class attack shuttle]]''' used by the [[Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Omicron Formation]]''', a tactic used by [[First Order]] [[First Order stormtrooper|stormtroopers]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Arcade Omicron]]''', a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]]
*[[Omicron (Delta-class)|'''''Omicron''''']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]
*[[Omicron (transport group)|'''''Omicron''''']], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transport]] group composed of [[Omicron 1 (Beta-class)|'''''Omicron 1''''']] and '''''[[Omicron 2]]'''''
*[[Omicron (shuttle)|'''''Omicron''''']], an Imperial [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttle]]
*'''''[[Omicron 023]]''''', an [[SCT Scout craft]]
*'''''[[Omicron 1]]''''', an Imperial ''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport
*'''''[[Omicron 5]]''''', an Imperial [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttle]]
*'''[[Omicron group]]''', an Imperial [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] group
*[[Omicron group (Delta-class)|'''Omicron group''']], an Imperial ''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport group
*The '''[[Omicron Hunter-21X]]''', a model of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]
{{Disambig}}
